card_description: The divine mind hiding through perfect mimicry within reality, camouflaged like a zebra in tall grass.
full_description:
The divine mind hiding through perfect mimicry within reality, camouflaged like a zebra in tall grass.

**Category:** Top Term

**Frequency:** 999 mentions. First appears 1976-09-15.

- (September 15, 1976) Dick explores the idea that 3-74 was an "override" of his regular social/political programming. He theorizes that he was "switched" from an alternate track (Black Iron Prison/Soviet agent) to a new...
